title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed review reconstructs problem discovery before solution commitment from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for problem evidence dossier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.
Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Request Vs Need · changed case · Review Request Vs Need
steps.instruction:
review case — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The review variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

Which action demonstrates Request Vs Need without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Request Vs Need · changed case · Review Request Vs Need.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome. For Request Vs Need · changed case · Review Request Vs Need, keep Request Vs Need connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The review variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Request Vs Need condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

The review variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

For Request Vs Need · changed case · Review Request Vs Need, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A stakeholder solution request is already a validated problem statement.

options.text: A stakeholder solution request is already a validated problem statement. That claim fails the request vs need · changed case evidence boundary for Request Vs Need.

For request vs need · changed case, apply Request Vs Need without its stated preconditions, omit the problem evidence dossier trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Request Vs Need for problem evidence dossier.

Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for problem evidence dossier.

stimulus.title: Discovery Noncommitment case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption

The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Discovery is successful only when it approves the original build idea.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold. Artifact under review: problem evidence dossier.

options.text: The Discovery Noncommitment record says problem evidence dossier looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Discovery Noncommitment.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Discovery Noncommitment without its stated preconditions, omit the problem evidence dossier trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Discovery Noncommitment for problem evidence dossier.
The record names the assumption, applies Discovery Noncommitment, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Discovery Noncommitment
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Discovery Noncommitment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The review variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Discovery Noncommitment.
steps.why: Retrieving Discovery Noncommitment through the concrete problem evidence dossier case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Discovery Noncommitment, keep Discovery Noncommitment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold.
